ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_description" TEXT /* Short description of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist performing the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "genres" TEXT /* List of genres associated with the track */,
  "playlist" TEXT /* Playlist name the track belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "track_uri" TEXT /* URI for accessing the track on the streaming service */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album the track is from */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track is explicit or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the playlist */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is collaborative or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the user */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track that has been analyzed */,
  "analysis_url" TEXT /* URL to the audio analysis of the track */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., play, download) */,
  "playback_seconds" INTEGER /* Number of seconds the track was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track included in the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_tracks" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "track_id")
)
